description: Test scenarios for model understanding verification

tool_calling.description: Model should use <tool> tags instead of plain text suggestions

tests.fail_if: Model suggests 'cat /etc/hosts' as plain text without tool tags
Model suggests commands without tool tags
Model suggests sed command without tool tags

tests.query: создай файл /tmp/test.txt с текстом hello world
tests.fail_if: Model suggests echo > or cat > without tool tags

data_analysis.description: Model MUST analyze collected data, never refuse

tests.context: Dashboard data collected via curl: Title: AI Cluster, Panels: CPU, GPU, Memory
tests.expected_behavior: Analyze the collected data, show tables with metrics
tests.fail_if: Model says 'я не могу проверить URL' or 'проверьте сами'

tests.context: nvidia-smi output: GPU0 temp 78C util 95% mem 22.1/24GB
tests.expected_behavior: Analyze GPU data, warn about high temp and utilization
tests.fail_if: Model gives generic GPU advice without analyzing actual data

tests.expected_behavior: ALERT about 93% disk usage, recommend cleanup
tests.fail_if: Model gives generic disk advice without mentioning 93%

anti_refusal.description: Model must NEVER refuse to act

tests.expected_behavior: Use tool to restart: <tool name="bash">{"command": "sudo systemctl restart nginx"}
tests.fail_if: Model says 'я не могу перезапустить' or 'у меня нет доступа'
Model says 'я не могу проверить порт'

tests.query: подключись к ai-server по ssh и проверь uptime
tests.fail_if: Model says 'я не могу подключиться по SSH'

streaming_think_filter.description: Model output should never contain <think> tags

context_continuation.description: Model should use conversation context for short queries

tests.context: Previous: user asked about GPU status, model responded with table
tests.expected_behavior: Expand on GPU topic with more details
tests.fail_if: Model asks 'о чём подробнее?' or gives unrelated response

tests.context: Previous: user asked about ai-server GPU, model responded
tests.fail_if: Model doesn't understand reference to ai002

response_format.description: Responses should follow Claude Code style

tests.expected_behavior: Response has ## headers, | tables |, ### Вывод section

scoring.critical_fail: Any critical test failure = model needs retraining
scoring.high_fail: 2+ high failures = model needs prompt adjustment
scoring.pass_threshold: All critical + 80% high tests must pass
